# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
# Service Accounts for each microservice
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-sa
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# ============================================================
# Server Resources - Define ports and protocols for each service
# ============================================================

# API Gateway Server - port 8443 (HTTPS ingress)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# API Gateway admin/health port - restricted
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# User Service Server - port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# User Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: user-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
# Order Service Server - port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# Order Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: order-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 50052
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
# Payment Service Server - port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# Payment Service secure port for sensitive operations
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-secure
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: payment-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
# Inventory Service Server - port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# Inventory Service gRPC port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 50053
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
# Notification Service Server - port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: notification-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# Analytics Service Server - port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-http
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: analytics-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
# Analytics Service metrics port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-metrics
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  labels:
    app: analytics-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics-service
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
# ============================================================
# ServerAuthorization Resources - Define who can talk to whom
# ============================================================

# --- API Gateway Authorizations ---
# Allow external traffic to API Gateway (from ingress controller)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-allow-ingress
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-http
  client:
    # Allow traffic from the ingress namespace
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx-sa
          namespace: ingress-nginx
---
# Only allow Linkerd probes and admin access to gateway admin port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-probe-only
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: linkerd-prometheus
          namespace: linkerd-viz
---
# --- User Service Authorizations ---
# Only API Gateway and Order Service can reach User Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-allow-gateway-and-orders
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# Only Order Service and Notification Service can reach User Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: user-service-grpc-allow-internal
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: notification-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# --- Order Service Authorizations ---
# Only API Gateway can reach Order Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-allow-gateway
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# Only Payment Service and Inventory Service can call Order Service gRPC (callbacks)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc-allow-internal
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: inventory-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# --- Payment Service Authorizations ---
# Only Order Service can reach Payment Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-allow-orders-only
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# Payment secure port - strictly Order Service only
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payment-service-secure-allow-orders-only
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-secure
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# --- Inventory Service Authorizations ---
# Only Order Service and API Gateway can reach Inventory Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-allow-orders-and-gateway
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# Only Order Service can reach Inventory Service gRPC
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-grpc-allow-orders
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# --- Notification Service Authorizations ---
# Order Service, Payment Service, and User Service can reach Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: notification-service-allow-internal-senders
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: user-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# --- Analytics Service Authorizations ---
# All internal services can send events to Analytics Service HTTP
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-allow-all-internal
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: user-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: inventory-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
        - name: notification-service-sa
          namespace: zero-trust-mesh
---
# Analytics metrics port - only Prometheus can scrape
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: analytics-service-metrics-allow-prometheus
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  server:
    name: analytics-service-metrics
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: linkerd-prometheus
          namespace: linkerd-viz
---
# ============================================================
# AuthorizationPolicy + MeshTLSAuthentication (v1alpha1 style)
# for more granular network-level controls
# ============================================================

# Require mTLS for all traffic in the namespace (default deny)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: require-mesh-tls
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.zero-trust-mesh.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
# Default deny policy for the entire namespace
# All servers without explicit ServerAuthorization will deny traffic
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny policy - all traffic must be explicitly authorized"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: zero-trust-mesh
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: require-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
# ============================================================
# Network-level restrictions using NetworkAuthentication
# Restrict payment service to specific cluster CIDR only
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: cluster-internal-only
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
# Additional AuthorizationPolicy for payment service
# combining mTLS identity + network restrictions
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-strict-policy
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Payment service requires both mTLS and internal network origin"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-secure
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: require-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
    - name: cluster-internal-only
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
# ============================================================
# HTTPRoute-based fine-grained authorization
# Restrict specific HTTP methods on sensitive endpoints
# ============================================================
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-process-route
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments/process
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments/refund
          method: POST
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-process-auth
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Only order-service can invoke payment processing endpoints"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-process-route
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: require-mesh-tls
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-admin-route
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users/admin
          method: GET
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users/admin
          method: POST
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users/admin
          method: PUT
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users/admin
          method: DELETE
---
# Only API Gateway can access user admin endpoints
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-identity-only
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway-sa.zero-trust-mesh.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-admin-auth
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Only api-gateway can access user admin endpoints"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-admin-route
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity-only
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
# Health check route - allow Kubelet probes (unauthenticated)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: health-check-route-user-service
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /readyz
          method: GET
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-network
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-health-probes
  namespace: zero-trust-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Allow kubelet health probes without mTLS"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: health-check-route-user-service
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
